summary: Completed comprehensive testing of FlowIQ personal finance dashboard MVP. All core features are working correctly after fixing a backend date parsing issue.

design_issues.note: Charts render correctly despite warnings - likely CSS container sizing issue

passed_tests: Backend API connectivity and all endpoints (8/8 tests passed)
Dashboard page loads with all components (balance card, cashflow prediction, spending chart, category chart, quick insights)
Demo data auto-seeding on first load
Navigation between Dashboard, Insights, and Upload pages
Insights page displays personalized financial recommendations
CSV upload parsing and importing transactions
Real-time data refresh after CSV upload
action_item_for_main_agent: Optional: Fix Recharts console warnings by ensuring chart containers have proper CSS dimensions. This is a minor cosmetic issue as charts render correctly.
